scripts.onboarding-validation:up: sh -c 'docker compose --env-file .env.test -f docker-compose.onboarding-validation.yaml down --remove-orphans -v && docker compose --env-file .env.test -f docker-compose.onboarding-validation.yaml up -d --build --renew-anon-volumes && until curl -sf "http://127.0.0.1:4173/login?mode=signup" >/dev/null && curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:3300/health >/dev/null; do sleep 2; done'
